nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Polls Telegram once per minute. getUpdates does not require public inbound access to n8n.

nodes.name: Call Telegram getUpdates
nodes.notes: Uses outbound polling, so n8n does not need to be reachable from the public internet. Delete any Telegram webhook for this bot first.

nodes.name: Run answer-run.ts
nodes.notes: Runs the answer macro: search, context, LLM answer, answer record, and feedback proposal.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Answer Log
nodes.notes: Sends a plain-text Telegram message through Bot API. Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and a chat id.

parameters.command: ={{ $json.telegram_lock_id ? "node /app/dist/tools/bot-lock.js release --vault /data/vault --name telegram-bot --lock-id " + JSON.stringify($json.telegram_lock_id) : "node -e " + JSON.stringify("process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ status: 'skipped', released: false }) + '\n')") }}

nodes.name: Run ingest-run.ts
nodes.notes: Runs the ingest macro, including YouTube transcript extraction for /ingest commands.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Ingest Log
nodes.notes: Sends a plain-text Telegram message through Bot API. Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and a chat id.

parameters.command: ={{ $json.telegram_lock_id ? "node /app/dist/tools/bot-lock.js release --vault /data/vault --name telegram-bot --lock-id " + JSON.stringify($json.telegram_lock_id) : "node -e " + JSON.stringify("process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ status: 'skipped', released: false }) + '\n')") }}

nodes.name: Run search-run.ts
nodes.notes: Runs hybrid search (falls back to FTS when semantic index is unavailable) and formats results for Telegram.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Search Log
nodes.notes: Sends search results as a plain-text Telegram message. Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and a chat id.

parameters.command: ={{ $json.telegram_lock_id ? "node /app/dist/tools/bot-lock.js release --vault /data/vault --name telegram-bot --lock-id " + JSON.stringify($json.telegram_lock_id) : "node -e " + JSON.stringify("process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ status: 'skipped', released: false }) + '\n')") }}

nodes.name: Run reindex.ts
nodes.notes: Rebuilds the FTS index from the current wiki markdown state.

parameters.command: ={{ $json.telegram_lock_id ? "node /app/dist/tools/bot-lock.js release --vault /data/vault --name telegram-bot --lock-id " + JSON.stringify($json.telegram_lock_id) : "node -e " + JSON.stringify("process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ status: 'skipped', released: false }) + '\n')") }}

nodes.name: Run health-check.ts
nodes.notes: Reports broken links and resolution suggestions without applying broken-link fixes; still runs new-link discovery.

parameters.command: ={{ $json.telegram_lock_id ? "node /app/dist/tools/bot-lock.js release --vault /data/vault --name telegram-bot --lock-id " + JSON.stringify($json.telegram_lock_id) : "node -e " + JSON.stringify("process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ status: 'skipped', released: false }) + '\n')") }}

nodes.name: Run enrich-batch.ts
nodes.notes: Scans enrich/{concepts,topics,entities,analyses}/ and processes each .md file sequentially. Failures per file do not abort the batch.

parameters.command: ={{ $json.telegram_lock_id ? "node /app/dist/tools/bot-lock.js release --vault /data/vault --name telegram-bot --lock-id " + JSON.stringify($json.telegram_lock_id) : "node -e " + JSON.stringify("process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ status: 'skipped', released: false }) + '\n')") }}

nodes.name: Run embed-index.ts
nodes.notes: Full rebuild: re-embeds every document. Use after changing embedding model or normalisation logic. Heap controlled by EMBED_MAX_OLD_SPACE_MB (default 3072 MB).

parameters.command: ={{ $json.telegram_lock_id ? "node /app/dist/tools/bot-lock.js release --vault /data/vault --name telegram-bot --lock-id " + JSON.stringify($json.telegram_lock_id) : "node -e " + JSON.stringify("process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ status: 'skipped', released: false }) + '\n')") }}

nodes.name: Run lint.ts
nodes.notes: Runs structural wiki linting: kebab-case, frontmatter, broken links, orphan pages, etc.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Lint Log
nodes.notes: Sends lint report summary as a plain-text Telegram message.

parameters.command: ={{ $json.telegram_lock_id ? "node /app/dist/tools/bot-lock.js release --vault /data/vault --name telegram-bot --lock-id " + JSON.stringify($json.telegram_lock_id) : "node -e " + JSON.stringify("process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ status: 'skipped', released: false }) + '\n')") }}

nodes.name: Run cosim.ts
nodes.notes: Computes cosine similarity between two wiki notes from the semantic index.

parameters.command: ={{ $json.telegram_lock_id ?
